globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self' https:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src * data: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src *;
